name: Cosmic Golf
address: 850 Pine Valley Dr Suite 112, Elizabethtown, KY 42701
about: Cosmic Golf is a year-round entertainment venue in Elizabethtown, KY, featuring outdoor driving range bays and indoor golf simulators. The venue combines golf with a full-service restaurant, bar, and event space, making it suitable for both play and dining. Pricing for outdoor bays is $50-$60 per hour for up to six people, with leagues and event specials available. It caters to a range of patrons from casual golfers to families and groups looking for a combined food and activity experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Combines indoor golf simulator play with a full-service restaurant and bar
Outdoor and indoor golf options available for year-round play
Hosts leagues and events, fostering a community atmosphere
Offers flexible booking for bays and a party room for groups
Pricing model accommodates both individual and group play

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant with a variety of burgers, sandwiches, wraps, pizza, and breakfast options. Kids eat free on Mondays.
Full bar available with cocktail and drink specials, including themed cocktails for events.

simulator_hardware.notes: Inrange Golf Technology simulators are used, but specific models are not detailed.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own or contact the venue directly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full restaurant and bar, and while BYOB policies are not mentioned, ordering food and drinks on-site is encouraged.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for an 18-hole simulator round, but typical rounds can range from 1-2 hours depending on simulator usage.

faq.question: Is Cosmic Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Cosmic Golf is kid-friendly with kids eating free on Mondays and a family-oriented atmosphere including an outdoor putting course.
